title: Buzbug LED Bug Zapper Indoor, 50000 H Long-Lasting LED, Energy Saving & Dual Band Attraction, High-Voltage Electric Mosquito Zapper, Fly Trap Mosquito Trap, Fly Killer -MA015B
bullet_points: Upgraded Dual-Band Attraction: Unlike traditional single-band fly traps, the Buzbug LED bug zapper utilizes dual-color LEDs (365nm + 395nm) engineered to target a broader insect spectrum. This dual-wavelength LED system expands the range, attracting 30% more species of flying insects (such as mosquitoes, flies, and moths), especially effective in low-light or nocturnal environments.

Long-Lasting & Cost Saving: Stop wasting money on frequent bulb replacements. Our high-efficiency LED tubes boast an exceptional lifespan of 25,000 to 50,000 hours—far outlasting standard glass fluorescent tubes. Buzbug fly killer provides a long-lasting solution that saves maintenance time and costs. (Bulbs are replaceable.)

High-Voltage & Wide Coverage: Equipped with a robust internal electric grid, this mosquito zapper delivers an instant kill upon contact. With a massive coverage area of up to 2,100 sq. ft., it is perfect for large living rooms, kitchens, dining areas, and balconies.

EPA Registered & Safety Protection: A dense outer protective grill prevents accidental contact with the internal grid, protecting children and pets. This electric fly trap provides physical bug control without odors or smoke and is fully registered with the U.S. EPA for compliance.

Modern Design with Portable Handle: Featuring a clean square profile and modern aesthetics, this mosquito zapper blends easily with home decor. The PU leather handle supports convenient hanging or repositioning.

One-Pull Tray & Easy Cleaning: Cleaning is a breeze with the slide-out, washable insect collection tray. Simply pull the tray to dispose of debris without touching the insects. We’ve also included a specialized cleaning brush for the internal grid. (Note: Always unplug the device before maintenance.)

Reliable Warranty & Usage Tips: The Buzbug bug zapper comes with a one-year warranty. A 2-year warranty covers the LED lamp tube. Pro Tip: Placing scented baits—such as sugar or fruit peels—in the bottom tray can enhance performance.
